chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3317 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.15047/2018 3. For hearing of main case 24.04.2025 Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General This petition is pending since 2018 and diary demonstrates that the petitioner remained unrepresented since 2018. Even otherwise the petition impugns an order issued in the revenue hierarchy with no justification as to why statutory mechanism abjured. In addition thereto show cause notices have been impugned directly in writ jurisdiction and the same is not maintainable in view of judgment in the case of Jahangir Khan Tareen1, approved in Judgment dated 15.09.2022 rendered in DCIR vs. Digicom Trading (CA 2019 of 2016). In view of the foregoing, petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad 1 Per Muhammad Ali Mazhar J. in CIR vs. Jahangir Khan Tareen reported as 2022 SCMR 92.
